overview: A study reminder app where students log in, create reminders with titles, subjects, and schedules, and receive audio+visual alerts when it's time to study.
features: Create and manage study reminders with title, subject, date, time, and notes
Dashboard showing upcoming reminders with countdown timers
Audio sound alert when a reminder fires
Snooze or dismiss reminders from an alert popup
Silent mode to mute sound while keeping visual alerts
Filter and sort reminders by status
Mark reminders as completed or dismissed
